plan:
## CummeRbund.SelectedGeneReport GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
CummeRbund.SelectedGeneReport is a GenePattern module that [**Beta Release** Contact gp-help with any issues. Check stdout.txt and stderr.txt for errors] Cuffdiff visualization package providing plots based on a single user-specified gene.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: cuffdiff.input, feature.id, output.format, feature.level, report.as.aggregate, log.transform
- Optional: selected.conditions, find.similar

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.15_Rscript> --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore <libdir>run_gp_cummerbund_selected_gene_report.R <libdir> --cuffdiff.input\=<cuffdiff.input> --feature.id\=<feature.id> <selected.conditions> <find.similar> --output.format\=<output.format> --feature.level\=<feature.level> --report.as.aggregate\=<report.as.aggregate> --log.transform\=<log.transform>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: cuffdiff.input
parameters.description: A Cuffdiff job, a previous CummeRbund job, or a cuffData.db file from a previous CummeRbund job.

parameters.name: feature.id
parameters.description: The gene or feature of interest.  This can be a gene symbol (short name), gene ID, isoform_id, tss_group_id, or cds_id.

parameters.name: selected.conditions
parameters.description: Specifies the conditions (samples) to be used in the plots.  This should be a comma-separated list of conditions, using the same names as in the upstream Cuffdiff job; leave this blank to use all conditions.  The Similarity plots will always operate across all conditions.

parameters.name: find.similar
parameters.description: Optionally, find and plot the top genes (up to this count) with an expression profile most similar to the given gene of interest.  If blank, this will be skipped.

parameters.name: feature.level
parameters.description: Feature level for the report.  Note that the Similarity plots will always be generated at the "genes" level.

parameters.name: report.as.aggregate
parameters.description: Controls whether reporting should be done for individual replicates or aggregate condition/sample values.  The default is to use aggregate sample values.  Note that the Similarity plots always show aggregate samples.

parameters.name: log.transform
parameters.description: Whether or not to log transform the FPKM values.
